title: Infosys collaborates with Glion Arena Kobe as digital innovation and Green Transformation partner
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a multi-year strategic collaboration with One Bright Kobe, operator of Glion Arena Kobe in Japan. Infosys will serve as the Official Digital Innovation and GX (Green Transformation) partner for the arena, using Infosys Cobalt, AI, cloud, data analytics, and user experience design to support visitor personalization, data-driven engagement, sustainable operations, carbon-footprint insights, regulatory compliance, and a cloud-based data platform. No deal value or financial impact was disclosed.

key_facts.fact: Infosys announced a multi-year strategic collaboration with One Bright Kobe, which operates Glion Arena Kobe, a new multi-purpose arena in Kobe, Japan.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Glion Arena Kobe as Official Digital Innovation and GX Partner

key_facts.fact: Infosys will be the Official Digital Innovation and GX (Green Transformation) partner of Glion Arena Kobe.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Glion Arena Kobe as Official Digital Innovation and GX Partner

key_facts.fact: The collaboration leverages Infosys Cobalt, described as a set of services, solutions, and platforms for enterprises to accelerate their cloud journey.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Glion Arena Kobe as Official Digital Innovation and GX Partner

key_facts.fact: Infosys will analyze digital data from arena visitors, including footfall, preferences, and social interactions, to enable personalized experiences and help stakeholders improve visitor engagement.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Glion Arena Kobe as Official Digital Innovation and GX Partner

key_facts.fact: Infosys will establish a cloud-based data platform using Infosys Cobalt standards for the arena.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Glion Arena Kobe as Official Digital Innovation and GX Partner

key_facts.fact: No deal value or financial impact was disclosed.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Glion Arena Kobe as Official Digital Innovation and GX Partner
